meta.title: How We Used Dynamic Edge Segmentation To Secure Our Hyperconnected Factory
meta.description:
Pharmaceutical giant GSK's hyperconnected manufacturing environment was rapidly expanding. Traditional segmentation methods proved inadequate, leading to the development and deployment of a Dynamic Edge Segmentation (DES) solution. 

Mark describes what DES is and how it differs from traditional network segmentation, and then describe his experience and lessons learned with this technology and solution. 

Subscribe to Dale’s ICS Security: Friday News & Notes email here:
https://friday.dale-peterson.com/signup
Check out S4x26. Feb 23 - 26 in Miami South Beach:
https://s4xevents.com
